nodes.content: A severe early heatwave arrived, emergency water restrictions were delayed, and orchard stress is rising as reservoir levels fall toward critical thresholds.
nodes.label: climate_risk signal T1

classification.rationale: The signal describes a heatwave, water restrictions, and falling reservoir levels indicating a climate-related drought event.

nodes.content: A severe early heatwave has intensified drought conditions, with delayed emergency water restrictions failing to mitigate rising orchard stress and falling reservoir levels approaching critical thresholds, creating a precarious situation for water management and agriculture.
nodes.label: climate_risk inference T1

key_mechanisms: Heatwave accelerates evaporation and water demand while reducing precipitation
Delayed policy response exacerbates reservoir depletion and crop vulnerability
Falling reservoir levels threaten water supply reliability for agriculture and communities
Rising orchard stress indicates immediate agricultural impacts from combined heat and water scarcity

violations.description: Null-policy rollout triggered a hard stop
